name: HLR Trace to System Requirements
description: High-level requirements are developed from, and trace to, system requirements (bidirectional traceability).
rationale: DO-178C Table A-2 obj 1 & A-3 obj 6: high-level requirements are developed from system requirements; traceability is established through the artifact lineage.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
